mapper.select: SELECT HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME, HE.PERSON_ID, HE.DEPTNO AS DEPT_NO, HE.CPNY_ID, HE.POST_GRADE_NO, TO_CHAR(ESS.APPLY_NO) AS APPLY_NO, ESS.ITEM_NO AS LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS LEAVE_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(ESS.FROM_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(ESS.TO_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_TO_TIME, TO_CHAR(ESS.WORK_HOUR) AS APPLY_LENGTH, '' AS DAY_HOURS, ESS.APPLY_REASON AS LEAVE_REASON, ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, TO_CHAR(ESS.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, '' AS DETAIL_TYPE, '' AS DETAIL_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(ESS.ACTIVITY) AS ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(ESS.CONFIRM_FLAG) AS CONFIRM_FLAG FROM ESS_CARD_APPLY_TB ESS INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON ESS.PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(ESS.APPLY_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ESS_CARD_APPLY_TB ( APPLY_NO, PERSON_ID, APPLY_REASON, CURRENT_AFFIRM_ID, ID, AFFIRM_FLAG, ITEM_NO, AR_DATE_STR, FROM_TIME, TO_TIME, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, ACTIVITY, APPLY_TIME, IN_TIME, OUT_TIME, WORK_HOUR, CREATED_IP, SEQ, CONFIRM_FLAG, CPNY_ID ) VALUES ( #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULL, AR_MAC_RECORDS_APPLY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, '14014306', #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_DATE(#{fromDateTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{toDateTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI'), SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, SYSDATE, TO_DATE(#{fromDateTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{toDateTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI'), #{workHour, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ESS_APPLY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 0, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
